summary: Initial outreach: research initiative on AI tools for medical professionals
Positive response. Interested in autonomous agents in healthcare. Wants to found a company.
Demo email sent by AI agent. Lee provided context about coding group.
Good phone call. She shared vallour.co.uk. Lee shared WorldMonitor and Medwise.ai.
Morning follow-up. Offered WhatsApp group and research help.
Wants to join WhatsApp group. Will put together a document.
Ideas: better Stan.store, automated organic marketing (Pinterest/YouTube/Meta/Twitter), referenced blaze.ai
Client folder created. CLAUDE.md, README, knowledge-base.json, proposal-email.html prepared. Awaiting Lee approval to send proposal.

Agent name confirmed: Moneytree. Infrastructure: AWS (Lambda, Bedrock, S3, CloudFront, SES, Step Functions, EventBridge, QuickSight). Moneytree proposal email drafted with AWS services breakdown, enterprise AI positioning, and recommended reading links. Sent to Lee for approval.

Moneytree proposal email sent. Subject: Moneytree: Your Autonomous Marketing Agent — Infrastructure & Next Steps. Includes AWS infrastructure table, enterprise AI positioning, 6 AWS reading links, capabilities breakdown, next steps.
